race.description: Damms Auto & Diesel Squizzy Taylor Dash Hcp (Bm52)
race.comment: MIGHTY FEAT (5) finished eighth two runs back at Yarra Valley then improved last time out to score by 2.25 lengths over 1000m at Dederang. This doesn't look much harder and he can go on with it. NOCI DI COCCO (7) ran a strong second over 1000m at Tumut two runs back then was below his best last time over 1100m when sixth, beaten 2.5 lengths. He can figure. DENSETSU (2) will find this easier after running in a 0-56 at Yarra Valley last time, fourth on that occasion. Well fancied to bounce back. YAMATO (11) missed the placings two runs back then did well last start but found one better over 1000m at Dederang, beaten only 1.3 lengths. Each way hope. KOOL KAT (4) resumes with claims from a soft draw.
